s3.bucket.notificationconfig.lambdaconfi: Describes the AWS Lambda functions to invoke and the events for which to invoke them.

s3.bucket.notificationconfig.lambdaconfi.Description: The Amazon S3 bucket event for which to invoke the AWS Lambda function. For more information, see [Supported Event Types](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/dev/NotificationHowTo.html) in the *Amazon S3 User Guide*.

The filtering rules that determine which objects invoke the AWS Lambda function. For example, you can create a filter so that only image files with a `.jpg` extension invoke the function when they are added to the Amazon S3 bucket.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS Lambda function that Amazon S3 invokes when the specified event type occurs.
